ddt:Target.Name: N_PZ1A_ADAS_sub_ADCU_FD_PT1_20210125
ddt:Target.Description: [N]Jan 25th, 2021 Nissan XX6 Initial creation, based on Rev7.

Item.Text: FM (Frequency Modulated) / PWM (Pulse Width Modulated) Failures
[C1F37](TBD)Consistency check of the R-car header information
Device and failure type ODB codding
FM (Frequency Modulated) / PWM (Pulse Width Modulated) Failures
circuit short to ground or open
circuit short to battery or open
signal rate of change below threshold
signal rate of change above threshold
signal bias level out of range / zero adjustment failure
signal has too few transitions / events
signal has too many transitions / events
alive / sequence counter incorrect / not updated
value of signal protection calculation incorrect
component or system operation obstructed or blocked

Data.Name: DTCFormatIdentifier
Data.Comment: DTC format - Renault/Nissan use value 0 (3 bytes DTC)

Data.Name: OutputPermanentControlList
Data.Comment: List of Data Identifiers for Input Output Control

Data.Name: IOCTL.DataIdentifier
Data.Comment: Data Identifier received in reply to InputOutputControl request

Item.Text: Steering wheel torque check & torque level registration(EOL)

Data.Name: RCTL.DataIdentifier
Data.Comment: Data Identifier received in reply to RoutineControl request

Data.Name: DataRead_$0158_#004_bit0_(TBD)Wheel edge torque control command value
DataRead_$0233_#004_bit0_(TBD)BSI yaw moment control command value
DataRead_$0280_#004_bit0_FAP steering angle control command value
DataRead_$0281_#004_bit0_FAP vehicle speed congtrol command value
DataRead_$0286_#004_bit7_FAP stop hold control request flag
DataRead_$02B0_#004_bit0_Accel pedal reaction force command value (call back)
DataRead_$02B1_#004_bit0_Accel pedal reaction force command value
DataRead_$0450_#015_bit1_LDP sensor judge D ray bulldog flag _LDP1
DataRead_$0451_#015_bit1_LDP sensor judge D ray bulldog flag _LDP2
DataRead_$0452_#015_bit1_LDP sensor judge D ray bulldog flag _LDP3
